name: It's the Holiday Treason
author: Cenbian
bootlegger: Every player has a Secret Santa gift, on the first night they'll choose a gift to give a predetermined recipient (Chosen by ST), everyone only has 1 secret santa gift to give and receive. This happens at the beginning of the night order
The gift recipient is not told what they got (Except for gift 6)
The Gifts a player can give are as the following:
2- Sober & Healthy till Day 3 (Does nothing to a Drunk)

3- Ogre, you become the same alignment as your recipient, but you won't be told what alignment you are (Demon can't Choose this, Minions who turn good do not learn their demon / Demon does not learn them)
4- Scapegoat protection, if they die by any reason, you might die by that reason instead
5- Political Pundit, Their vote counts for 2 until they die

6- Friendly Boffin, give your recipient 1 trigger of a ST chosen townsfolk ability (Ongoing roles get 1 night of info, 1 time use abilities only trigger once when applicable. Can be in play already, Gifter doesn't learn which role was given, Recipient learns what they got)
